creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: The problem is all cards have the firmware, so you'd always have to load on demand. Or are you suggesting just for isp systems? That's not a terrible idea now that we have binary firmware loading in addition to the old.ko based scheme. But I'd wager it is too late for the release, despite this regression. We should note the workaround in the release notes and also task the loader folks to export pci devices to lua so workarounds like this could be scripted in the future.
